description:
Configure and execute a multi-turbine Lifting Line Theory (LLT) simulation in the 'Turbine Simulation' project to analyze wake shadowing. Position two turbines at (0, 0, 0) and (50, 0, 0). Configure the simulation with a wind speed of 12 m/s, a 0.1 s timestep, and 200 total timesteps. Create a report at /home/ga/Documents/wake_loss_report.txt using the following format:

Upstream Power: [Value] kW
Downstream Power: [Value] kW
Wake Loss: [Value] %

Save the project as /home/ga/Documents/projects/wake_study.wpa.
